# Redirecting to dischargeinjunction.com
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Free educational resource at dischargeinjunction.org.

## About
dischargeinjunction.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Redirecting to dischargeinjunction.com: https://dischargeinjunction.org/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
